what_was_requested: ETAP 1: Funding Rate Regime Gate — test whether funding rate extreme filtering improves the regime-gate shell
what_was_done: 1. Synced funding event data (events_sync, started). 2. Previewed funding events — found only settlement timing columns (is_funding_settlement, bars_since/until_funding_settlement), not raw funding_rate values. 3. Searched research memory — no prior funding rate feature work found. 4. Attempted custom feature cf_funding_regime validation but failed because event columns aren't available in the feature dataset validation context. 5. Changed approach: used bars_until_funding_settlement as a builtin runtime field directly in signal logic. 6. Cloned active-signal-v1-regime-gate to active-signal-v1-funding-gate. 7. Validated both long and short signals with added condition bars_until_funding_settlement > 2. 8. Saved version 2. 9. Ran backtest (run_id: 20260407-171718-f7cc3794). 10. Results: Net PnL $1149.62 (baseline $1520.78, -24.4%), 326 trades (baseline 388, -16%), Sharpe 1.105 (baseline 1.385), Max DD 2.85% (baseline 3.08%), WR 50.0%, PF 1.423. 11. Attempted research_record write but MCP timed out. Walk-forward and condition stability analysis not run due to poor base results making them unnecessary.
error: research_record MCP timed out on write; cf_funding_regime custom feature validation failed (event columns not available in feature dataset context)
raw_output:
